title: ferray-stats: searchsorted missing sorter= parameter
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.searchsorted(a, v, sorter=indices) allows searching in an array that isn't sorted directly, by providing a permutation index array. ferray-stats searchsorted requires the array to be pre-sorted. The sorter parameter is useful for avoiding a copy when you have argsort output.
